description: Agience Stream Source — persistent configuration artifact for a live stream input. Creating an artifact of this type in a workspace generates a stream key. When OBS (or any RTMP client) connects with that key, a session artifact is automatically created and configured agents are dispatched.

context_schema.title: string — display name for this stream source
context_schema.stream.obs_api_key_id: string — ID of the API key used to authenticate OBS; raw key is never stored, only derived at rotation time
context_schema.stream.target_content_type: string — MIME type for session artifacts created on stream start (default: video/mp4)
context_schema.stream.agents: string[] — agent artifact IDs (in the same workspace) to dispatch when a session ends
context_schema.stream.sessions: string[] — session artifact IDs created by this source, most recent last
context_schema.stream.auto_transcribe: boolean — when true, automatically transcribe completed stream sessions via Verso
context_schema.stream.credential_artifact_id: string — ID of an application/json credential artifact (aws_access_key_id / aws_secret_access_key / aws_region) managed by Seraph
context_schema.stream.server_url: string — RTMP ingest URL for this platform instance (set automatically on first key rotation)
context_schema.stream.language_code: string — AWS Transcribe language code (default: en-US)

ui.label: Stream Source
ui.description: Live stream source — configure an RTMP stream input. Paste the stream key into OBS. Each stream start creates a session artifact and dispatches the configured agents.
